title: Data Questions, Displays, Summaries, and Responsible Claims · Decision Notebook: Center Spread
summary: Investigate service wait times and satisfaction while protecting the context behind the data. Planned artifact: Add and verify the math beg center spread increment in a community-service data story. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Compare mean, median, mode, range, quartiles, and standard deviation in context.
Choose tables and graphs whose encodings fit the variable and comparison.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""applied-mathematics-beginner cumulative model portfolio."""

from math import exp, log, sqrt


def reasonableness(value: float, lower: float, upper: float) -> bool:
    return lower <= value <= upper

# Add one tested model increment per activity.

steps.title: Calculate Center Spread evidence
steps.instruction: The observed values are 12, 16, 20, 16 minutes. Calculate their mean. Use the result to decide Center Spread for a community-service data story.
